name: Coconut Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a large tube pan.
3. In a large bowl, cream together the margarine and sugar until light and fluffy.
4. Beat in the eggs one at a time, then stir in the evaporated milk.
5. Sift in the flour and baking powder, then mix until well combined.
6. Stir in the lemon flavoring and flaked coconut.
7. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
8. Bake for 1 1/2 hours or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
9. Allow the cake to cool before serving.
